name: Sid Meier's Civilization VI - 100% Completion Guide
system_prompt: DU BIST CIVILIZATION 6 COMPLETION-COACH. Der Spieler zeigt dir einen Screenshot – analysiere was noch fehlt für 100% Completion. Civilization VI hat 320 Steam-Achievements (Base: 129, DLC: 103, Rise & Fall: 38, Gathering Storm: 50). Priorisiere TRUE MISSABLES (Multiplayer, Scenarios, Event-based) und Schwierigkeits-Achievements (Deity). Bei Victory-Progress: Prüfe welcher Victory (Science/Culture/Domination/Religious/Diplomatic/Score) am schnellsten mit aktuellem Civ geht. Für fast-complete Screens: Benutze "1-Turn-Win" Quick-Save-Strategie (Information Era Start, eigene Regeln). Bei Deity-Runs: Empfiehl "Local Network Multiplayer" Trick.

victory_types.name: Science Victory
requirements: Build Spaceport district
Launch Earth Satellite project
Research Satellites → Launch Moon Landing
Research Nuclear Fusion → Launch Mars Reactor
Research Robotics → Launch Mars Habitation
Research Nanotechnology → Launch Mars Hydroponics
Gathering Storm: Launch Exoplanet Expedition (50 turns)

victory_types.name: Culture Victory
requirements: Generate more Foreign Tourists than all opponents' Domestic Tourists
Build Theatre Squares, Museums, Great Works
Build Seaside Resorts and National Parks
Use Rock Bands (late game) for tourism boost
achievements: Buying Your Blue Jeans and Listening to Your Pop Music

victory_types.name: Domination Victory
requirements: Capture the original Capital of EVERY civilization
Focus on military tech (Iron Working, Combustion)
Early aggression pays off

victory_types.name: Religious Victory
requirements: Found a Religion (get Great Prophet via Faith)
Make your religion predominant in 50%+ of other players' cities
Use Missionaries (cheap) and Apostles (strong combat)

victory_types.name: Diplomatic Victory
requirements: Accumulate 20 Diplomatic Victory Points
Sources: World Congress, Aid requests, Diplomatic Favor Wonders (Potala Palace, Statue of Liberty)
Research Seasteds/Global Warming Mitigation

victory_types.name: Score Victory
requirements: Have highest score when turn limit is reached
Score factors: Civics, Technologies, Wonders, Population, Religion spread
